Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}It's dangerous to go out on your own at night. Please refrain from doing so.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Besides, you must be tired after today. You should make sure to get a good night's rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}I must say, the moon looks quite stunning on this hazy spring night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Though tempting as it may be to spend a night such as this gazing at the sky...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I suggest you head to bed early and get some rest. Don't worry, there will be more full moons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}Well, Akihiko seems to be his usual self. But that doesn't mean he isn't helpful, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Incidentally, what are you doing here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is the girls' floor. If you don't have a particular reason to be here, go back downstairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4066 0 0}You may go out at night, but please use the appropriate discretion with this privilege.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Tartarus—riddled with mysteries as it is—will no doubt challenge you with unexpected encounters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you ever feel outmatched, there is no shame in a wise retreat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Detection ability is crucial for exploring Tartarus efficiently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been training my own such ability, but it will take more work still before I am fully competent.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}Generally speaking, you may do whatever you like on your days off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}You can stay in and study or go out and enjoy yourself. It's up to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_005_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What do you do on days off?

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}Just don't do anything reckless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4080 0 0}More often than not, I'll be in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I tend to feel more at ease keeping to my books rather than gallivanting outdoors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4078 0 0}A piece of advice for fighting in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}To get the upper hand in combat, I suggest attacking Shadows from their blind spot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You will have the advantage if you can launch a preemptive strike without being noticed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Try to utilize this technique often.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}As president of the student council, I'm really quite busy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}In fact, it's quite rare that I have any time to rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4039 0 0}I won't require your help constantly, but stop by the student council room when you have time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll look forward to your contributions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Online games...? Well, some casual recreation is fine, but try not to get carried away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}If it should devolve into an unhealthy obsession... Need I say the rest?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}The higher we advance up Tartarus, the stronger our enemies will become.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you feel that your current equipment is adequate?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}That's good to hear. Just don't get careless.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You should consider paying Officer Kurosawa a visit when you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}Officer Kurosawa sells equipment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You should go see him when you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Well, remember that Officer Kurosawa sells equipment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You should pay him a visit when you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}Akihiko is still having some tests done. He should be back tomorrow, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4078 0 0}Our school's exams tend to be difficult, but you'll be fine as long as you're diligent about studying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That said, you just transferred and then were hospitalized for a time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'll see what I can do to help you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Akihiko's injuries will need some more time to fully heal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Will you be able to continue fighting with only three members until he returns?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}*chuckle* Your confidence is commendable. I wish you the best of luck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}I see... I suppose you'll have to do your best to adjust for the time being.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I know you can do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}I'll be counting on you all until Akihiko recovers. I have every confidence that you'll manage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}Were you looking for me? I'm training my Persona's ability to detect enemies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can't say for certain that a large enemy like the one from last month won't attack again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's no excuse for being unprepared. We can't afford to let ourselves get caught off guard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4002 0 0}Did you have a productive Golden Week?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}As for myself, I generally stuck to the same routine I follow every Golden Week.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although I did keep a close eye on Akihiko to dissuade him from trying anything reckless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}*sigh* Akihiko... What is he thinking, suggesting that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Clearly, it's high time I reestablished some ground rules.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I'll need to further improve my detection ability to pick up on less conspicuous abnormalities...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll do my best, but this will likely take some time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}In lieu of being able to fully rely on my abilities, try to prepare for all contingencies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}You've been here for a little over a month now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know it hasn't exactly been an ordinary experience, but generally, how are you faring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}You're leading quite an unusual school life, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}*chuckle* I appreciate your honesty. But yes, I certainly understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, we have an important job to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure, when all is said and done, you'll be able to come away with more than just exhaustion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}I'm sure your experiences here will prove useful for you, in some way or another.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4069 0 0}It was my own incompetence during the operation that led to a difficult situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, even if you forgive me, I don't think I can forgive myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should another situation like this arise in the future, I promise I will be stronger by then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If there is indeed a next time... I promise to be stronger by then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}The general public considers the monorail incident an accident caused by human error.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}The public will likely pin it on the operating company for being negligent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4055 0 0}It's unfortunate, but it would be unrealistic to ask that blame be put on the Shadow at fault.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}There seems to be something wrong with some of the equipment in the command room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Could I bother you to check on it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}Akihiko and Iori didn't appear interested in solving the matter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}I won't force you, but if you're not too busy, I would appreciate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You need an extremely high level of concentration to summon a Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}So, if an enemy is able to confuse you in battle, you won't be able to use your Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Some of the more intelligent enemies will try to use this tactic...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So be on your guard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}It's good to be motivated when it comes to SEES, but remember that we're students first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}With that in mind, be sure to keep up with your studies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Needless to say, all of us have experienced fear at some point in our lives...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But in Tartarus, certain enemies can forcibly inflict it upon us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This "fear" may render one immobile in battle, while others may attempt to flee altogether.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}Once afflicted, your volition will be all but defunct, so keep your guard up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I'd like you to hold off on going to Tartarus today and tomorrow. Would that be all right with you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4039 0 0}I'm glad we're on the same page. Please use this time to study for the exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Everyone is busy studying for the exams and may not have time to go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}For this weekend, I'd like you to put Tartarus out of your mind and focus on your studies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4005 0 0}It certainly gets quiet in the dorm right before exams.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This unusual silence may make for a good time to train my Persona's detection abilities...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well... "silence" aside from Iori's screaming, that is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}We were very lucky to find another Persona-user...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, it can't be helped if she's unwilling or unable to fully participate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}Come to think of it, the chairman mentioned he had some business with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have you spoken with him yet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If not, I'd like you to as soon as you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}Whenever I look up at Tartarus, I'm always amazed at how many floors it seems to have.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The tower reaches to the skies...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}*sigh* It's going to be a long and arduous journey...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4078 0 0}The equipment in the command room still seems to be malfunctioning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know the details, but it appears to be the cause of some unidentifiable error.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}If you have time to examine it, I'd appreciate it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4056 0 0}I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of training my Persona to search for enemies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The others appear to be busy as well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you were planning on going to Tartarus, perhaps it would be better to go another night instead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}This incident is quite troubling. As the student council president, I need to do something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}Though it doesn't help that I have no idea what's really going on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}If Takeba won't go to Tartarus tonight, perhaps it would be better to go when everyone can join us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Though I have to admit I'm a bit curious about these supposed "hauntings"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4068 0 0}It is difficult for me to believe that the incident was caused by ghosts...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, we are currently at a lack of a more logical explanation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So it may be worth looking into. Please let me know if you come across any useful information.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4009 0 0}How is your research into the ghost story progressing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}C'est magnifique! Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4025 0 0}Well, I can see why it would be difficult to ascertain the truth in such a situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}But don't let yourself be discouraged.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4039 0 0}I'm impressed that you've been able to gather so much information in such a short amount of time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}It began with a ghost story, but it has developed into a serious situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}We have to do something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}I apologize for not being able to go to Tartarus multiple days in a row.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Preparing for Yamagishi's move has taken longer than I anticipated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4079 0 0}...In any case, this floor is reserved for the girls' rooms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Males are not permitted. Please return downstairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, there are some things in life you don't want to know about...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}This is one of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4080 0 0}My weapon of choice is the thrusting sword.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was once used to settle duels in Europe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Its power and accuracy may be average, but it's a reliable weapon with no particular downsides.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}I, personally, do not like to gamble with the effectiveness of my weapon, so it's ideal for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}It seems certain clubs have begun actively recruiting new members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but you're already in a club, aren't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Well, there's no rule against joining multiple clubs. Feel free to join any that pique your interest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Juggling studies, club activities, and Shadows won't be easy, but it'd surely build character.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}While we can't slack on our exploration of Tartarus if we want to solve its mysteries...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's important to rest and take time for yourself as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're free to go out or spend time with the others in the dorm. Just don't stay up too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}I'm thinking right now. If you're looking for someone to talk to, please find someone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Our abilities are quite inexplicable...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not just anyone can acquire them, and we're still unaware of what exactly triggers an awakening...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}And yet, we would be quite lost without our abilities, wouldn't we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If he's going to be late, he should at least have the courtesy to call me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4077 0 0}Even though there's time until the next full moon, we had best use that time wisely.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Of course, training in Tartarus is one way to prepare.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Whenever you are inclined to do so, do not hesitate to ask me to join you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4029 0 0}This is one of the chairman's indulgences. As to whether his jokes are actually humorous or not...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well... It would be quite boorish of us to make such comments on the matter to his face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You'll simply have to get used to it. Just try to ignore him if it gets to be too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}There will be a full moon in a week. You do understand what that means, yes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Good. Then make sure you're adequately prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4121 0 0}It seems powerful Shadows appear on nights with full moons.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}In other words, you'll want to make sure your preparations are in order ahead of time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4121 0 0}One week remains until the next full moon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}You'll want to be ready for the upcoming battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}As you may recall, I handled support before Yamagishi joined us, so I was worried my sword skills might have deteriorated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}However, muscle memory kicked in and I seem to be as capable as ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}It appears that the number of the Lost is increasing again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This time, however, it seems many of the new cases specifically involve couples.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm... Perhaps who the Shadows target is dictated by the time of year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}I don't mind if you go out, but remember that we'll be facing a Shadow soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Try not to expend yourself too much beforehand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}I suppose we'll soon see if his hypothesis is correct...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If it is, the next Shadow will appear tomorrow. Best be prepared.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4069 0 0}With each full moon, the Shadows that appear get stronger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But why full moons? Each question simply begets more questions...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}It's fine to reflect on your victory...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But don't forget that there are exams next week as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_504_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4076 0 0}I didn't mean to hide anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I simply told you what you needed to know, and omitted the details I deemed unnecessary...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4055 0 0}But I should stop making excuses...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}Regardless of my reasons, there's no denying that I kept some information secret...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}Have you made all your preparations for Yakushima?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4106 0 0}Oh? You had adequate spare time during finals, did you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, as long as you did well on them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Well, we're leaving the day after tomorrow, early in the morning. Make sure you're ready by then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}We're leaving early the day after tomorrow, so be sure to get some rest tomorrow night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}Hm, an anti-Shadow weapon... That will be a most welcome addition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Most souvenirs are useless. Snow globes, keychains, postcards...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}However, this souvenir from Yakushima is très bien.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4077 0 0}It must be difficult for you to balance combat and studies. I should do more to help you all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps summer school would be beneficial... Well, let's wait and see how the others did.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}He'll be staying at the dorm, but remember, he's not a member of SEES.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So be very careful what you say around him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And don't talk with him about anything regarding Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}As a result, I'm not sure that we've been going to Tartarus often enough.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please make sure you're prepared for the next full moon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4114 0 0}The veterinarian told me that Koromaru is in stable condition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The wound was severe, but, fortunately, there wasn't any damage to his internal organs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Mastery of both academic obligations and combat is no mean feat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}And yet you continue to deliver. Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}I thought you'd like to know: Koromaru's condition seems to be improving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4025 0 0}Yes. He may have a diminutive figure, but he's a fighter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We would do well to learn from his example and stay vigilant in our own endeavors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_097_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}Don't worry, he'll be all right. Try to focus on the Shadows for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}Tomorrow night, during the Dark Hour, we will battle a new Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You won't be able to go to Tartarus between now and then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you should still prepare your items and equipment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4068 0 0}I didn't expect to meet Persona-users outside of ourselves and those we've located and recruited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not to mention ones filled with malice and hostility...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}As if we haven't been busy enough keeping the Shadows at bay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}It must be easier taking Koromaru on walks with the nights being cool this time of year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Dogs can't regulate their body heat by sweating, you see. So remember to keep an eye on him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4077 0 0}You may want to consider attending the summer festival at the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't think I'll be making a point to go myself, however.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't particularly enjoy crowded venues.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6037 0 0}I contend with that assertion. It would be more advantageous to deploy together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4103 0 0}I've been thinking about what we feed Koromaru...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We typically give him standard dog food, but do you think we should add some variety?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I imagine he'd get bored of eating the same meal every day, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}There is the option of preparing something by hand... But for now, I'll simply buy different food.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}Your summer break next year will likely be inundated with studying for entrance exams, so make use of this free time while you have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4052 0 0}This dorm was built some time ago, so the air conditioning unit doesn't work very well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's usually tolerable, but today... I can understand why Iori is griping so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_570_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}One of the members of Strega seems to have taken an interest in you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sometimes, a malicious human being can be more dangerous than a Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you should cross paths, I want you to be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apathy Syndrome cases are increasing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We must do something about this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I hate to say this, but the number of the Lost is increasing again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You'll want to start getting ready for the next battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Now that Koromaru's joined us, you may want to consider devising some new tactics.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}There's going to be a full moon soon after vacation ends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Prepare yourself for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}He seems very determined... Normally, I would think he would be a great addition to SEES.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}His age worries me, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We will need to keep a close eye on him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}I'm sure you're aware, but we won't be able to use air conditioning during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That means we'll also be dealing with heat in the upcoming battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}See to it that you stay hydrated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4057 0 0}I recommended Aigis's attendance at school to the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Aigis requested that she attend and I couldn't think of any reason why she shouldn't.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The chairman agreed, so there you have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4039 0 0}I truly am glad to have you back, Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But admittedly, I'm curious as to what motivated you to pick up your Evoker once again...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Something must have affected you profoundly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll be in the mood to tell you someday...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4055 0 0}I'd appreciate it if you didn't probe Aragaki about the past too much...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Aragaki, Akihiko, and I were all in SEES when we were in middle school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}A lot of things happened back then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}But there's no need to doubt Aragaki. I assure you that he's reliable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4044 0 0}Why is Iori so excited about tomorrow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's going to be a full moon tomorrow, and with it, another powerful Shadow to fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hardly think that's the kind of thing to be excited about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4103 0 0}Aragaki's suppressant, and Akihiko's expression...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I hope you're getting along with Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's a little rough around the edges...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}But, deep down, he's really a nice guy. Just give him a chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}The typhoon threatens to cancel the festival...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's a shame. As student council president, I have invested a lot of time into organizing it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope we'll still be able to hold the festival, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4121 0 0}I suppose all we can do is trust in providence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}The number of the Lost surges every full moon. It's relentlessly unceasing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope we'll discover some breakthrough by climbing Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}As student council president, I am saddened to hear the festival has been canceled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I suggested that the date be rescheduled, but it seems that won't happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, there is nothing one can do to hinder Mother Nature's will.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_121_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Then you'll have no problems going to Tartarus, I take it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4106 0 0}Then you should rest a little while longer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was enough having to deal with Akihiko's recklessness to the point of injury...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4069 0 0}The news has been reporting that the number of the Lost is increasing again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wish we could receive some good news for once...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_124_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}I realize this is after the fact, but are you at all disappointed the culture festival was canceled?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_126_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}A great number of people have voiced their disappointment regarding the cancellation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, the decision is final. We will not be having a festival this year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4056 0 0}You will have to wait until next year to attend the culture festival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}I think it's unfortunate that you all missed out on the culture festival this year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I suppose the current second-years will have to make up for it next year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4077 0 0}The moon will be full again soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The end is near, but don't get nervous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just prepare for victory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}This next battle is going to be difficult. If you are not prepared, defeat is probable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not necessary to be hypervigilant at all times, but do be proactive in your preparations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}Akihiko's right. Amada must decide what is best for himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It is a difficult decision for such a young person to make, but I'm not worried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Amada has a strong will...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}I am confident he will make the right choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}It seems I appraised him accurately. He has the soul of a warrior.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I admire his fortitude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4127 0 0}He gave his life to save another... How noble...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd like to think that I could do the same, if it came down to it. How about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4132 0 0}*chuckle* That's an interesting response. Though I suppose quite admirable as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_139_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}That's understandable. It would be a very difficult thing to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4138 0 0}I realize it may be difficult given recent events, but have you been studying for the exams?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_143_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I understand how you're feeling, but you must persevere.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Unfortunately, life can be quite cruel sometimes, but we have to keep moving forward anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4005 0 0}I was worried about how the loss of Aragaki would affect the rest of the team...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}But it seems everyone is not letting it deter them. He must be smiling down on us from above.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_149_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}So, how did you do on your exams?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4029 0 0}Considering the circumstances, I'll accept "okay." Well done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_153_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}Well, I'm sure you did what you could, given the circumstances. Try not to be too hard on yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_153_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}All things considered, simply having made it through exams is praiseworthy in of itself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}The next full moon is approaching. Let's be prepared.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I want to be able to give a successful report to Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_156_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Hm... I can never tell what you're thinking, even when I'm looking straight at you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So how are you feeling about our next operation? As I'm sure you know, it will be our last.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_158_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}I understand... The tension grows stronger day by day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4048 0 0}Really? That is quite impressive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}It is unusual for someone to maintain such composure in a situation like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_159_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}I must admit, there is something exhilarating about knowing this will be our final battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I have no doubt that it'll be a fierce fight, but let's make sure we come out of it victorious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_164_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}SEES will most likely be disbanded after the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I have so many memories of my time in SEES... Both good and bad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}What about you? Would you say you enjoyed participating in SEES, overall?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_166_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}I'm glad. Then I hope you always remember the good times we shared together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_167_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Don't worry. I'm not offended.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}But regardless, thank you for all you've done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_167_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}I'm sure there must have been times when you would rather have left this all behind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}But despite that, you've been extremely helpful. I truly am grateful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I don't think Strega will simply allow us to defeat the last Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}They will either try to stop us outright or secretly set a trap for us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}What do you think they will do, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}I agree. That seems to be their only viable option.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If they were to set a trap, Yamagishi would be able to detect it and we could avoid it easily.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_171_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4025 0 0}It is certainly a possibility...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}In that case, we will need to rely on Yamagishi to detect anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4042 0 0}Thank you for all you've done for us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's give it our all in the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4055 0 0}Sorry, but I won't be going to Tartarus for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}*sigh* I can't seem to find a reason to fight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}Or a reason to live, for that matter...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Are you looking forward to the trip, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_180_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}Well, I hope it will be memorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_181_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}I see... If that has anything to do with my situation, please don't let it bother you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope you enjoy your trip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_186_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Kyoto is filled with many beautiful sights.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But the most memorable for me was the Kamogawa River, especially during the evening.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}The sunset was absolutely amazing. I will never forget it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_187_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Kyoto is filled with many beautiful sights.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The sole blemish of the trip was an incident instigated by a group of peeping scoundrels.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}Do you have anything to say for yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_188_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}The saying "Earnest labor brings happiness" is simply a pretext.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, there are some people, like Yukari's father, who put their whole lives into their work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}At any rate, I'd advise you to take full advantage of this opportunity to learn about the workforce.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_189_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4076 0 0}She was taking those drugs as well. If she hadn't died now, she most likely would have died soon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But Fate chose the most beautiful way to end her life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_190_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}There's a saying, "Time heals all wounds." Do you think that will apply to Iori?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Losing a loved one isn't something you exactly get over, no matter how much time passes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps it's best to leave him be to figure it out on his own for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_192_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Unfortunately, I'm not sure there's much else we can do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_193_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}I would like to, but I'm not sure what we could do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_194_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Even though she was an avant-garde artist, she left a sketchbook filled with portraits of Iori.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You do understand the reasoning behind her drastic change in artistic style, yes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_197_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}Well, it's very important, so take some time and think about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_197_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Take to heart your thoughts and feelings about that illustration of Iori.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You may just learn a life lesson that you'll need to draw upon someday.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_202_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4109 0 0}Aigis said something akin to the idea that, as a machine, she is replaceable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}She may have been programmed that way, but it's still painful to hear...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_203_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4127 0 0}I've never truly thought about my own life ending...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}It feels like everything I thought I knew has been destroyed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_204_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}We should organize the information we already have. Is there anything you want to go over?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_206_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4063 0 0}After the incident, Aigis was taken to the laboratory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}The researchers are tending to her. But with the injuries she sustained, it's going to take a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_207_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4062 0 0}Aigis may have lost her memories of the battle she waged with Ryoji Mochizuki ten years ago...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But some part of her must have still detected that he was a Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}An incredibly strong Shadow that she had faced once before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_208_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4064 0 0}That is an excellent question. Ryoji Mochizuki is a Shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The same Shadow that Aigis sealed inside you ten years ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Over those ten years, that Shadow changed as a result of being held within a human.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Eventually, it gained the appearance and characteristics of a human being itself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4109 0 0}And those human characteristics are what influenced it to give us a "choice."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_209_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}Ikutsuki and my grandfather both accepted the Fall as the rightful fate of the world...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}They didn't believe the world was worth saving...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}What destroyed their hope for the future...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_210_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4066 0 0}I just got a report from the laboratory. They are optimistic that Aigis can be fully repaired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}However, they are unsure as to how long it may take...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_211_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}But she was seriously damaged, so I'm just relieved to hear that they can fix her at all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_212_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1115 0 0}Yeah, me too. I hope she can come back soon, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_213_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}We have to make such a difficult decision...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Could you ever have imagined that we'd be in this situation?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_215_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But regardless, it's happening. We must decide what we are going to do about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_216_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4093 0 0}...You're a very interesting person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_216_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4109 0 0}We'll just have to clear our heads and come up with an answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...But even though I know what needs to be done, I'm still hesitant to actually do it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_217_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4133 0 0}I had considered the possibility that we could simply stop Ryoji from initiating the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But it appears that isn't a possibility after all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And if we kill him, we'll lose our memories, but still be unable to prevent it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_218_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4033 0 0}Although I proposed living life as normally as possible, I suppose that's easier said than done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Knowing what's going to happen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's almost too much to bear...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_219_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4132 0 0}Everyone needs a break once in a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Would you like to join us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_220_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1099 0 0}Wait, Senpai! It's girl time, remember?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_222_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}*chuckle* It's okay. Dogs and grade-schoolers are allowed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_225_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, you heard her. Sorry, but the decision has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_226_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Children all over the world will receive presents from a jolly old man in a red suit...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, one day, they will realize that the jolly old man doesn't really exist, and they will be sad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But that sadness will eventually lead to maturity, and then they will leave their childish toys behind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4130 0 0}Christmas... What an interesting holiday...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_227_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The answer was right in front of me the entire time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}If I don't make it, then someone else will have to take over the company.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although, I have every intention of returning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_230_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}Don't think of this as our last Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Simply think of it as this year's Christmas... and enjoy it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_231_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4011 0 0}I don't believe you have any business with me at the moment, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't you go somewhere with someone? It's Christmas, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_232_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure this will be both the longest and shortest week of our lives.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_232_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}I feel much calmer now, compared to when we first learned of the coming events.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}It must be because now I'm certain of the choice I wish to make.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_233_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4127 0 0}When I think about my grandfather... and what he did...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If it wasn't for him, everything would be okay right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4133 0 0}I know it's not good to dwell on the past, but... *sigh*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_234_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4013 0 0}Don't worry about Aigis. She is currently being treated with the utmost care.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I wouldn't accept anything less for a valuable teammate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_235_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Aigis will be back tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_236_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4002 0 0}The researchers at the laboratory told me she has developed something akin to emotions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}They said she appears more "human."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_237_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4087 0 0}The day is finally here... I know my answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_238_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}You and Mochizuki were alone. You could have killed him if you wanted to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you chose not to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Thank you for making that decision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_239_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}I'm glad that we were able to celebrate the new year, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This month is going to be very important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Make sure you spend your time wisely.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_240_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}The mantra of the cult is, "If you believe, you will be saved."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ridiculous, isn't it? Similar lines have been used to brainwash the gullible throughout history.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We will need to keep our guards up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4070 0 0}The public seems to be fooled by these words.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_241_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}It's been three days now. At least the pressure of making the decision itself has lifted, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_242_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1149 0 0}To be honest, I'm still not completely sure that we made the right choice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_243_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6058 0 0}I'm sure such feelings are inevitable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's human nature to wonder about the choice that was not chosen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_244_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}That's true. People are always asking themselves, "What if...?"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_245_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well... I guess we'll always wonder, then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}But this is the choice we made, so let's do all we can with it so we don't regret it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_246_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4003 0 0}Cases of Apathy Syndrome are on the rise again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There have been a lot of people reported missing as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4092 0 0}Society is crumbling before our eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_246_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4082 0 0}Honestly, there was a time last year when I thought Tartarus may not even have a peak.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I still feel somewhat nervous, but I'll take this over the anxiety of those times any day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's said that having a clear goal brings stability. Though this is quite a way to learn that moral.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_247_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4121 0 0}I knew the cult would have some influence over the school, but to this extent...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can you think of any effective ways to counter them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_249_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}All we can do is hope that people have it within them to withstand the cult's teachings.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_250_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}The entire cult...? I would prefer not to do that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Eliminating the cult should only be our last resort.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_251_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}You may be right. Nyx's influence appears too great...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}In that case, we'll just have to defeat Nyx itself to break the control the cult has over everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_252_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4074 0 0}Akihiko and I will be taking our college entrance examinations on the 16th and 17th.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So we'll be out during the afternoon, but we should be back before nightfall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Therefore, we'll be available to go to Tartarus, so not to worry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_253_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4069 0 0}I'd say 95% of the people referred to as "charismatic" by the media are charlatans.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And Strega are certainly not in the genuine 5%.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}They don't have charisma. They're just agitators who are stirring up unrest in society.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_253_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}Come to think of it, have you decided on a career path yet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I recommend being proactive now so you're not overwhelmed as a third-year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Remember, defeating Nyx isn't the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4059 0 0}It's a means for us to keep moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_254_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Strega believes the Fall will bring "salvation." But I wonder what my grandfather thought of it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}He didn't believe in the future...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}So perhaps he also thought like Strega.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But that's just speculation. The dead cannot speak on their own behalf, so we may never know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4073 0 0}Yes, Koromaru's physical condition and morale will need to be in top shape for the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Good thinking, Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_257_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}The Kirijo Group will protect her with all the resources at its command.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_258_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4077 0 0}You'll be having your career consultation soon. Have you given it any consideration?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_260_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}Good. Speak with confidence when you meet with your teacher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_261_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}While I admire your determination...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}After we defeat Nyx, our lives will continue on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd advise you to make thinking about your future more of a priority.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_261_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}Defeating Nyx is merely a milestone on the larger journey into the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Accordingly, you'll want to think hard about that future now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_266_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}The Promised Day is almost here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This will be our last battle. There won't be any second chances.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Everything has been leading to this singular moment...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}So make sure you're more prepared than ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_267_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4080 0 0}I wasn't able to protect my father...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}But his dreams live on inside of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}I'll make sure they come true...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_269_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}From here on out, there's no turning back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_270_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Once we enter Tartarus, I know that[n]we won't leave until the battle is over...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_271_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4008 0 0}Are you absolutely certain that you're ready?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_274_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}All right. Then let me know once you've finished preparing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}Everyone else is ready whenever you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_572_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4042 0 0}I apologize for all the trouble. But please accept my thanks all the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I want you to know that I fully intend to do all I can to honor his memory.[n]{f 1 1}
